ingredients.name: Chicken Breast
ingredients.notes: Boneless, skinless. The everyday workhorse.

ingredients.name: Butter
ingredients.notes: Salted sticks for cooking and baking.

ingredients.name: Chicken Broth
ingredients.notes: Low sodium — season the pot yourself.

ingredients.name: Heavy Cream
ingredients.notes: For gravies, sauces, and biscuits.

ingredients.name: All-Purpose Flour
ingredients.notes: White Lily is the family favorite.

ingredients.name: Yellow Squash
ingredients.notes: In season through the summer.

ingredients.name: Cooked Chicken
ingredients.notes: Leftover or rotisserie chicken, shredded or diced.

ingredients.name: Rice
ingredients.notes: Long-grain white rice, cooked.

ingredients.name: Broccoli
ingredients.notes: Fresh or frozen florets; thaw and drain frozen well.

ingredients.name: Garlic
ingredients.notes: Fresh cloves.

ingredients.name: Milk
ingredients.notes: Whole milk for the creamiest sauces.

ingredients.name: Sharp Cheddar Cheese
ingredients.notes: Shred it fresh — it melts smoother than pre-shredded.

ingredients.name: Parmesan Cheese
ingredients.notes: Grated, for depth of flavor.

ingredients.name: Paprika
ingredients.notes: Sweet paprika, for color and mild flavor.

ingredients.name: Dried Mustard
ingredients.notes: A little adds a savory tang to cheese sauces.

ingredients.name: Black Pepper
ingredients.notes: Freshly ground is best.

ingredients.name: Onion
ingredients.notes: Yellow onion, our everyday cooking onion.

ingredients.name: Carrots
ingredients.notes: Fresh, for dicing into soups and pot pies.

ingredients.name: Rosemary
ingredients.notes: Fresh — strip the leaves from the woody stem before chopping.

ingredients.name: Parsley
ingredients.notes: Fresh flat-leaf, for stirring in at the end.

ingredients.name: Frozen Peas
ingredients.notes: Stir in near the end so they stay bright and don't go mushy.

ingredients.name: Pie Crust
ingredients.notes: Refrigerated, two crusts to a package.

ingredients.name: Eggs
ingredients.notes: Large. One beaten egg makes an egg wash for golden crusts.
